policies.agreeBanner: By using QuizMate AI, you agree to comply with the policies below. Violations may result in appropriate measures under these policies and the Terms of Use.
policies.violationWarningText: Cheating, abuse, or distributing harmful content harms our community and the service. Depending on severity, accounts may lose access to features or no longer be allowed to sign in, as described in our policies and decided through our review process.
